targets.expr: sum by (instance, runner, system_id, runner_name, failure_type) (rate(gitlab_runner_worker_processing_failures_total{job=~"$job"}[2m]))
sum by (endpoint, status, instance, runner, system_id) (rate(gitlab_runner_api_request_statuses_total{job=~"$job"}[2m]))
targets.legendFormat: endpoint: {{endpoint}}, status: {{status}}, instance: {{instance}}, runner_id: {{runner}}; system_id: {{system_id}}, runner_name: {{runner_name}}
